features.featureTitle: In the footer of AppLayout (the area containing '© 2026 APA 9-Ball Scorekeeper. Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai'), add a small 'Debug' text link next to or below the copyright line. Clicking this link toggles the existing DebugPanel component open and closed. The DebugPanel component already exists at frontend/src/components/debug/DebugPanel.tsx — import and reuse it as-is. The gear icon button must retain its existing Edit Profile behavior completely untouched. No changes to the header, nav buttons, any other layout elements, or any other functionality.
